title: helichrysum sclerochlaenum
intro: Helichrysum sclerochlaenum, also known as Everlasting Ice Plant, is a succulent plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Helichrysum sclerochlaenum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
